title: E2E test for /account/purchases page
body: Add a Playwright E2E test at tests/e2e/ that verifies: (1) unauthenticated user gets redirected to login, (2) authenticated user sees their transaction list, (3) clicking a transaction navigates to the detail page.
rationale: The integration test covers the API endpoint but not the full page render and navigation flow.

title: Receipt download link
body: The issue mentions 'receipt download link' but this was not implemented. A future issue should add receipt PDF generation and download (e.g., /api/account/transactions/[id]/receipt route).
rationale: The issue spec explicitly calls out receipt download link as a required field per transaction row.
